invariant: detect_risk_shift renders contradicting fresh risk signals as mixed with caution rather than choosing an unqualified winner.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = detect_risk_shift returns mixed risk with both contradictory claim ids and an unresolved contradiction warning.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds one account, two fresh contested risk claims, and one unresolved contradiction edge.
fixture_design_notes.provider_replay: Pins mixed risk with both source claim refs.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: No unqualified increasing or stable direction wins.
fixture_design_notes.expected_provenance: Both source claims appear in attribution and contradiction warnings.
